segment.source: Renders an intro (eyebrow, heading, subheadline) above a two-, three-, or four-column grid of category cards, each with title, optional item count, rich-text description, and an 'Explore' link. Use it for: browse-by-category sections, product or service category overviews, directory entry points, topic hubs with counts ('24 products', '12 articles'). Prefer 'Content Grid' for generic content cards without navigation intent; use 'Menu: Selected Pages' for an automatic page-link list.
